title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Starboard
subtitle: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Highlight the best messages by collecting star reactions into a dedicated channel.

settings.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Starboard Configuration
settings.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Configure when and where starred messages are posted.
settings.channelIdDesc: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] The channel where starred messages are posted.
settings.starEmojiDesc: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] The emoji used to star messages. Defaults to the star emoji.
settings.thresholdDesc: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Minimum number of reactions required to post a message to the starboard.
settings.selfStarDesc: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Allow message authors to star their own messages.
settings.nsfwAllowedDesc: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Allow messages from NSFW channels to appear on the starboard.
settings.ignoredChannelsDesc: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Messages from these channels will never appear on the starboard.

toast.saveFailed: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Failed to save starboard settings
